name: grape-swagger-demo-ts
description: TypeScript SDK with React Query generated from grape-swagger OpenAPI 3.1.0 demo

scripts.generate:spec: cd .. && RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rails runner "require 'json'; env = Rack::MockRequest.env_for('/swagger_doc', 'HTTP_HOST' => 'localhost'); status, headers, body = Rails.application.call(env); content = body.respond_to?(:body) ? body.body : body.to_a.join; spec = JSON.parse(content); File.write('demo-ts/swagger.json', JSON.pretty_generate(spec))"
scripts.generate:all: npm run generate:spec && npm run generate
